text: Verify that form validation rejects empty required fields.
Test that input fields reject invalid formats such as non-numeric age.
Validate that sensor timeout triggers a retry after 3 seconds.
Verify API returns 503 when sensor is unavailable for more than 10 seconds.
Test PDF report generation with 100 records.
Verify CSV export contains all required columns.
Test notification alert is triggered when threshold exceeds defined limit.
Verify email notification is sent within 30 seconds of threshold breach.
Test that duplicate records are rejected by the database constraint.
Verify rollback occurs if a write transaction fails mid-operation.
Test dashboard auto-refreshes every 5 seconds with live data.
Verify login page renders correctly on mobile and desktop.
Test that configuration changes take effect without restarting the service.
Verify that response time under 50 concurrent users is below 2 seconds.
Test that user storage quota is enforced and exceeded quota is rejected.
